criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and sophistication of artificial intelligence features integrated into the app, such as image generation, enhancement, and editing.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, user reviews, expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, usability studies, expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and versatility of features offered by the app, including editing tools, filters, and customization options.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, feature lists, expert reviews.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The app's speed, responsiveness, and stability during use.
criteria.sources: Performance benchmarks, user feedback, expert testing.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The availability of the app across different platforms (iOS, Android, web, desktop).
